interpretation: 201473 ZTF stars across 77 off-plane fields searched in two channels (deep aperiodic dips + secular fade); 95%% Poisson UL = 1.49e-05, within a factor ~1.5 of the Kepler ~1e-5 base rate. GOLD=0 under strict F/G criteria; the one substantial fader was an independently-confirmed but mundane active K dwarf.
